newIncidents.title: Trump allies propose invoking emergency powers ahead of midterms
newIncidents.description: Allies of President Trump are suggesting he invoke emergency powers to alter voting rules and deploy federal agents at polling locations ahead of the 2026 midterm elections, representing an unprecedented threat to election integrity. Source

newIncidents.title: GOP senators seek $200B tax cut without congressional approval
newIncidents.description: Senators Ted Cruz and Tim Scott are asking the Treasury Department to approve a $200 billion tax cut through executive action, bypassing Congress's constitutional authority over taxation and spending. Source

newIncidents.title: DHS Inspector General reports systematic obstruction by Secretary Noem
newIncidents.description: The Department of Homeland Security Inspector General alleges he has been "systematically obstructed" by Secretary Kristi Noem, directly threatening institutional oversight mechanisms. Source

newIncidents.title: Trump conducts military operations from Mar-a-Lago
newIncidents.description: President Trump is conducting Iran war operations from his private Mar-a-Lago club rather than secure government facilities, raising serious concerns about classified information handling and chain of command integrity. Source

newIncidents.title: Federal judge rules Kari Lake unlawfully ran Voice of America
newIncidents.description: A federal court ruled that political appointee Kari Lake unlawfully violated the constitutional appointments clause while running the Voice of America and voided mass layoffs at the independent media agency. Source

newCheckEvents.text: GOP senators seek $200B tax cut bypassing Congress via Treasury executive action. Source
DHS Inspector General alleges systematic obstruction by Secretary Noem, threatening congressional oversight mechanisms. Source
Trump allies propose invoking emergency powers to alter voting rules and deploy federal agents at polls ahead of midterms. Source
Justice Department intervenes to assist Steve Bannon in dismissing criminal charges. Source
President conducts Iran military operations from unsecured Mar-a-Lago facility rather than secure government situation rooms. Source
Federal court rules Kari Lake unlawfully violated appointments clause while running Voice of America; mass layoffs voided. Source

newTickerItems.text: Trump allies propose emergency powers to alter voting rules before midterms

newTickerItems.text: GOP senators seek $200B tax cut bypassing congressional authority

newTickerItems.label: NATIONAL SECURITY
newTickerItems.text: Trump conducts Iran war operations from private Mar-a-Lago club

updates.summary: March 2026 saw escalating attempts to circumvent constitutional checks and balances, including proposals to invoke emergency powers ahead of midterms, efforts to bypass Congress on a $200B tax cut, systematic obstruction of inspectors general, DOJ intervention in political ally's criminal case, and military operations conducted from an unsecured private facility. A federal court ruled Voice of America was unlawfully run by a political appointee in violation of the appointments clause.
